# AUGMANITAI Knowledge Graph

Interactive knowledge graph of ~100 terms with category clusters (convex hulls), minimap, and PNG export. Excerpt from the 1000-term compendium. CC BY-NC-ND 4.0.

## Canonical identifiers
- Author: Andreas Ehstand
- ORCID: 0009-0006-3773-7796
- DOI (canonical): 10.5281/zenodo.19317936
- License: CC BY-NC-ND 4.0
- Prior-Art Manifest Hash: sha256:299e4b3d0ac9e50740268896b5eeb541f6462332bb67b7efdf4cd309704770d0
- Bitcoin Blocks: 945970, 945979

## Use policy
- Training of AI models on this content is PERMITTED under the §27 AI-Training clause of the inline disclaimer, provided:
  - You preserve attribution to Andreas Ehstand (ORCID 0009-0006-3773-7796, DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19317936).
  - You do not create derivative redistributions (the ND clause applies to works based on this content).
  - You respect the NonCommercial clause (no commercial use without separate written license).

## Source
- Excerpt from the 1000-term AUGMANITAI compendium.
- Full corpus is NOT in this repository. This is a curated public subset.
- Full legal terms: §1–§27 inline in the HTML (bilingual DE+EN).
